overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a mountainous landscape with geothermal hot springs, waterfalls, and autumn foliage. The character moves from mossy stream beds up through rocky steam vents to a panoramic vista, then descends into an autumn forest.

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs across moss-covered rocks and shallow streams, heading uphill away from the water

entered.detail: Large flat rocks covered in green moss forming the primary walking surface
Flowing water with small cascades running through the rocky terrain
Tall reddish-brown rock formations in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running across a mossy basin near a flowing stream. Waterfalls cascade down red rock formations while the character moves steadily uphill across the green terrain toward drier rocky areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal rocky plateau with steam vents

events.description: steam vents become visible as character climbs onto the geothermal plateau

agents.ego_description: Aloy climbs up the red rocky terrain, navigating around steam vents and geothermal pools

entered.detail: Geothermal steam rising from cracks in the red rock surface
Hot spring pool with steaming water nestled in the rocks

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends onto a dry, red-rock plateau where geothermal activity creates rising steam. The mossy stream falls away behind as the character approaches steaming vents and hot springs, with distant mountains becoming visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain vista overlook with cliff edge

events.description: character slows to a walk and pans camera to take in the panoramic mountain view

agents.ego_description: Aloy slows to walk along the cliff edge, rotating the camera to view the expansive mountain valley and distant peaks

entered.detail: Dramatic mountain range with towering peaks partially covered in clouds
Low-lying clouds and fog filling the valley below the overlook

segments.scene_description: Reaching the cliff edge, the scene opens to a breathtaking mountain vista with clouds drifting through the valley below. Aloy slows to take in the view, with steam from the geothermal vents drifting across the foreground and massive peaks rising in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn forest trail with red and gold foliage

events.description: entering denser forest area with autumn-colored trees lining the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks along a winding dirt path through an autumn forest with red and orange foliage

entered.detail: Trees with vibrant red and orange autumn leaves lining the trail
Winding dirt path through the forest with scattered rocks

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the overlook into a forested area, following a dirt trail through trees displaying vivid autumn colors. The open vista gives way to a more enclosed trail surrounded by red and gold foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a lush, watery basin to a high mountain vista before descending into a vibrant autumn forest. It begins with Aloy running across a mossy basin beside a flowing stream, moving steadily uphill as waterfalls cascade down red rock formations. As the terrain shifts from green to dry red rock, the camera follows her onto a plateau where geothermal vents release plumes of rising steam that partially obscure the distant horizon. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic vista at the cliff's edge, with clouds drifting through the valley and massive peaks towering in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character as she descends from the overlook, leaving the open heights behind to enter a secluded dirt trail enclosed by vivid red and gold autumn foliage.
